_comment: Step 4.10 (04-program §5): mutation testing over the intelligence engine — the place a silent bug is most costly after the finance calculators (which get their own scope in Phase 5). OPT-IN via `npm run test:mutation`; never part of the default `npm test` gate. The kill vehicle is the unit tier (the engine suites all live there and run in ~250ms); the command runner keeps our zero-framework harness. Threshold per the approved blueprint: break under 75.
